framework.name: IETF Agent Operation Authorization (draft-liu-agent-operation-authorization-00)
framework.description: Alibaba-authored IETF OAuth WG draft (Nov 2025) defining a two-phase JWT-based delegation framework: agent proposes operations via PAR, human confirms, AS issues a scoped authorization token the agent carries to resource servers. Uses W3C Verifiable Credentials to bind the user's original natural-language prompt to the structured authorization.
framework.raw_quote: A JSON Web Token representing confirmed authorization for a specific agent operation, enforceable at runtime by agents and verifiers. It cryptographically verifies user intent, prevents unauthorized or hallucinated actions, and ensures auditable traceability of each authorized operation.
